reviews.comment:
Fuera de CABA el GNC o nafta es caro y en el interior es muy caro !

(Translated by Google)
Outside of Buenos Aires, CNG or gasoline is expensive, and in the interior of the country it's very expensive!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtakxlUHZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Aunque un edificio antiguo es bonito, tiene de todo y atienden rápido

(Translated by Google)
Although it's an old building, it's beautiful, it has everything you need and the service is fast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdEsyZERBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar lindo, porque al lado de la YPF hay una plaza con juegos y parrillas y muy arbolado, hermoso para descansar y seguir.Tambien hay agua

(Translated by Google)
It's a nice place, because next to the YPF gas station there's a plaza with playground equipment and grills, and lots of trees—a lovely spot to rest and continue your journey. There's also water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNUlMQ09BEAE

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente la atención es un desastre, saludas y no te contestan, no te ofrecen controles de ningún tipo y ni siquiera miran a la cara, una estación tan grande debería tener empleados acordes ofreciendo mejores servicios. O quiA pasar a retiro el personal q ya no se encuentra en condiciones para atender al público.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, the service is a disaster. You say hello and they don't answer, they don't offer any kind of assistance, and they don't even look you in the eye. A station this large should have employees who are better equipped to provide better service. Or perhaps they should retire the staff who are no longer fit to serve the public.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtaFByNVVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Impecable atención

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtLU1uM2JREAE

reviews.comment:
Paramos para cenar tenían muy poco para ofrecer y realmente muy caro yo no entraría nunca más y preferible ir a la Shell que esta pegado a la YPF

(Translated by Google)
We stopped for dinner. They had very little to offer and it was really expensive. I would never go back and prefer to go to Shell, which is next to YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtLUxUS29BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo bien acorde al servicio de ACA, salvo el playero que me parecio inepto. Atendía desordenado. Pedí llenara el tanque y cargo parcial. Lento para habilitar aplicación

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine, as expected from ACA, except for the gas station attendant who seemed inept. He was disorganized and served customers. I asked him to fill the tank, but he only did a partial fill. He was slow to activate the app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdU5UU3NBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena la atención pero tuve q desayunar afuera y con descqrtables porque no permiten perritos

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but I had to eat breakfast outside with disposable containers because they don't allow dogs.

reviews.comment:
Unos chorros ,viejo bajen los precios son un abuso ,no están en Nueva York me sentí estafada ,no volvería más

(Translated by Google)
Some thieves, man, lower your prices, it's an abuse, they're not in New York, I felt ripped off, I wouldn't go back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMzVlcDZ3RRAB
